segments.text: Bless the LORD, O my soul, and all that is within me, bless his holy name!
segments.speaker: David

heading: A Psalm of David. Praise for God's Merciful Kindness

segments.text: Bless the LORD, O my soul, and forget not all his benefits,
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: who forgives all your iniquity, who heals all your diseases,
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: who redeems your life from the pit, who crowns you with steadfast love and mercy,
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: who satisfies you with good so that your youth is renewed like the eagle's.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: The LORD works righteousness and justice for all who are oppressed.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: He made known his ways to Moses, his acts to the people of Israel.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: The LORD is merciful and gracious, slow to anger and plenteous in mercy.
segments.speaker: God

footnotes: plenteous in mercy: Heb. great in mercy

segments.text: He will not always chide, nor will he keep his anger forever.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: He does not deal with us according to our sins, nor repay us according to our iniquities.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: For as the heavens are high above the earth, so great is his steadfast love toward those who fear him;
segments.speaker: God

footnotes: as the heavens are high: Heb. according to the height of the heaven

segments.text: as far as the east is from the west, so far does he remove our transgressions from us.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: As a father shows compassion to his children, so the LORD shows compassion to those who fear him.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: For he knows our frame; he remembers that we are dust.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: As for man, his days are like grass; he flourishes like a flower of the field;
for the wind passes over it, and it is gone, and its place knows it no more.

footnotes: it is not: Heb. it is not

segments.text: But the steadfast love of the LORD is from everlasting to everlasting on those who fear him, and his righteousness to children's children,
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: to those who keep his covenant and remember to do his commandments.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: The LORD has established his throne in the heavens, and his kingdom rules over all.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Bless the LORD, O you his angels, you mighty ones who do his word, obeying the voice of his word!
segments.speaker: David

footnotes: that excel in strength: Heb. mighty in strength

segments.text: Bless the LORD, all his hosts, you his ministers, who do his will!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Bless the LORD, all his works, in all places of his dominion. Bless the LORD, O my soul!
segments.speaker: David
